home.intro: senior front-end developer with 8+ years of experience. i write about frontend architecture, JavaScript internals, and the Vue ecosystem.

about.title: about
about.bio1: I'm Furkan — a senior front-end developer based in Istanbul with 8+ years of experience building production-grade web applications across fintech, travel, e-commerce, and foodtech.
about.bio2: I specialize in frontend architecture, large-scale migrations (Vue 2 → 3), and building codebases that scale with growing teams. Deep in the Vue.js ecosystem — Vue 2/3, Nuxt.js, Pinia — with cross-framework fluency in React. I've worked with distributed teams across Canada, Latin America, Estonia, and Turkey.
about.bio3: Currently leading the frontend modernization at AGRA Fintech. Previously architected B2B booking integrations at Tatil.com (5M+ monthly visitors), built operations platforms at KBOX Global, and delivered e-commerce solutions for L'Oréal brands at Alegra Digital.
about.bio4: Outside of work, I ship indie mobile apps under Hexify — handling everything from product design to App Store publishing.
